name: Heal
description: Channels holy energy to restore health to a target ally.

name: Codex Mastery
description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a book. Increases healing power.

name: Increased Recovery
description: Accelerates mana regeneration.

name: Haste
description: A surge of energy rushes through the limbs, quickening reflexes and footwork.

name: Benediction
description: Imbues allies with divine protection, raising all attributes for a time.

name: Faith
description: Strengthens divine conviction, increasing damage against Undead and Shadow foes while reducing harm taken from them.

name: Divine Grace
description: Invokes a holy blessing that increases natural health and mana recovery rate.

name: Sacred Aegis
description: Envelops an ally in divine protection, forming a barrier equal to a portion of their maximum health. The aegis shields them completely from incoming physical attacks until it is broken.

name: Cure
description: Channels purifying energy to dispel harmful afflictions, restoring clarity where corruption once lingered.

name: Holy Light
description: Releases a focused ray of divine energy, dealing holy damage to a single enemy.

name: Arcanum Ward
description: Creates a sacred barrier that absorbs Magic damage, shielding an ally from hostile spells.

name: True Sight
description: Reveals hidden enemies.

name: Resurrection
description: Revives a fallen ally with a portion of their health and spirit restored. Requires strong faith and a long invocation.

name: Mighty Roar
description: Let out a powerful roar to bolster nearby allies.

name: Earth Splitter
description: Slam the ground with immense force, staggering enemies and slowing them in the shockwave.

name: Dark Claw
description: Rip into the target with savage slashes, inflicting bleeding and fueling your rage.

name: Wild Charge
description: Leap forward with ferocious momentum, crushing enemies on impact and leaving them bleeding.

name: Blood Howl
description: Unleash a savage howl, feeding allies with bloodlust.

name: Furious Shout
description: Channel your fury into a battle cry, empowering allies.

name: Execute
description: Deliver a devastating finishing blow, dealing massive damage.

name: Brutality
description: Violence fuels your strength.

name: Cyclone
description: Spin violently while advancing, pulling enemies inward and shredding them with relentless strikes.

name: Fearsome Cry
description: Terrify nearby enemies with a deafening shout, staggering and stunning them while enraging yourself.

name: Berserk
description: Power without restraint. Enter a berserk state, greatly enhance combat power.

name: Axe Throw
description: Hurl your axe in a brutal arc, striking the target twice before it snaps back into your grasp.

name: Blood Frenzy
description: Violence without pause. Sacrifice control for speed and sustain.

name: Increased Regeneration
description: Improves natural health recovery over time.

name: Blood Crash
description: Release stored Rage, instantly healing yourself and regenerating health over time.

name: Unyielding
description: Consume Rage to steel your body, resisting incoming damage through sheer will.

name: Suppressive Shot
description: Pins enemies down with suppressive fire, weakening those caught in the blast.

name: Piercing Shot
description: Fires a high-velocity round that pierces through enemies, staggering and knocking them back.

name: Fan Fire
description: Rapidly unloads a flurry of shots at a single target.

name: Jump Shot
description: Leap into combat and fire mid-air, staggering enemies on impact and opening them up for follow-up attacks.

name: Explosive Grenade
description: Hurls an explosive charge that detonates after a short delay, burning enemies in the area.

name: Poison Grenade
description: Releases a toxic payload that poisons enemies over time.

name: Sniper Shot
description: Channels a devastating precision shot, dealing massive damage to a single target.

name: Panic Burst
description: Unleashes a sudden burst of gunfire, damaging enemies in an area and finishing prepared combos.

name: Gun Mastery
description: Increases attack power with all firearms and slightly improves attack speed. Allows dual wielding pistols.

name: Point Blank
description: Fires a brutal close-range blast, blinding enemies and finishing shotgun combos.

name: Freeze Grenade
description: Throws a freezing charge that immobilizes enemies caught in the blast.

name: Aerial Shot
description: Leap through the air while firing downward, striking enemies below before landing in an evasive stance.

name: Flash Bang
description: Backslide out of danger and prepare a flash grenade, setting up your next move.

name: Shrapnel
description: Blasts enemies with shrapnel at close range, slowing and bleeding those struck.

name: Trigger Happy
description: Enter a heightened firing state, automatically attacking nearby enemies while in motion.

name: Lockdown
description: Brace your weapon and lock your position, unleashing sustained fire with heavy weapons.

name: Shock Absorber
description: Reinforce yourself for close combat, reducing incoming impact while wielding shotguns.

name: Dual Loadout
description: Allows swapping between equipped gun sets.

name: Taunt
description: Forces affected targets to focus all basic attacks on you.

name: Spear Mastery
description: Enhances attack power of spears and maces. Increases maximum health.

name: Shield Mastery
description: Improves block rate and defences when equipping a shield.

name: Endure
description: Prevents flinching from damage.

name: Piercing Flurry
description: Lunge forward with rapid jabs, striking multiple enemies in a line.

name: Fortify
description: Massively increases defensive capabilities.

name: Twohand Parry
description: Allows two-handed weapons to block attacks.

name: Impale
description: Deliver a precise, piercing blow. Deals bonus damage when used at the end of a combo.

name: Air Cutter
description: Sweep your weapon in a swift arc, staggering enemies around you.

name: Spear Quicken
description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or spear.

name: Weapon Throw
description: Hurl your weapon forward in a spinning path, damaging enemies as it returns.

name: Counter Stance
description: Take a defensive stance and retaliate with a counter slash when struck.

name: Wand Mastery
description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a staff. Increases casting speed.

name: Earthbolt
description: Harnesses the pulse of the earth to strike a single foe with crushing, earthen might.

name: Firebolt
description: Launches a concentrated flame that scorches a single enemy with fire-element Magic damage.

name: Thunderbolt
description: Calls down a high-voltage bolt that strikes a single enemy, dealing wind-element Magic damage.

name: Icebolt
description: Hurls a shard of ice to deal water-element Magic damage to a single enemy.

name: Earth Spikes
description: The ground erupts in a sudden burst of jagged stone, impaling enemies from below.

name: Fireball
description: Casts a fiery orb that explodes on impact, dealing fire damage in an area. Leaves behind a Firewall at the impact zone.

name: Thunder Storm
description: Calls down a storm of lightning over a target area, striking all enemies within.

name: Ice Shard
description: Fires a fast-moving ice projectile that shatters on impact, damaging and potentially freezing enemies.

name: Energy Shield
description: A shimmering barrier hums with arcane force, absorbing harm until its energy fades. Redirects a portion of incoming damage to MP instead of HP.

name: Free Cast
description: Allows the caster to move and attack while casting, at the cost of reduced movement and attack speed.

name: Blink
description: Instantly teleport to a target location, evading danger and repositioning with precision.

name: Summon Abomination
description: Summons a stitched mass of decaying flesh that controls space through sheer size and presence.

name: Summon Skeleton
description: Raises a Skeleton Soldier to fight at your side, forming the backbone of your undead army.

name: Skeleton Mastery
description: Enhances undead summons, increasing their damage output and resilience.

name: Summon Skeleton Mage
description: Raises a Skeleton Mage that attacks from range with unstable necromantic magic.

name: Summon Wraith
description: Summons an elite undead arcanist that amplifies necromantic power and commands lesser undead.

name: Bone Spear
description: You hurl a sharpened lance of bone, piercing through flesh and spirit alike.

name: Corpse Barrier
description: You bind stolen bone and life into a grim protective barrier that absorbs incoming damage.

name: Scythe Mastery
description: Increases weapon damage when wielding scythes, axes, or swords, and enables life siphoning through melee combat.

name: Bone Spikes
description: Jagged bone spires erupt violently from the ground, impaling enemies caught above them.

name: Death Coil
description: You unleash a coiling strand of undead energy, damaging enemies and healing your summons.

name: Corpse Explosion
description: You violently explode a skeleton summon, scattering necrotic force outward in a lethal detonation. Causes nearby enemies and summons automatically explode on death.

name: Harvest
description: You leap forward in a wide scythe swing, carving through enemies and priming them for a devastating follow-up.

name: Reanimation
description: You bind the lingering spirit of a fallen boss to your will, claiming it as an undead champion.

name: Life Drain
description: You siphon vitality from enemies to sustain yourself. When bound to a summon, its aggression surges at the cost of its own life.

name: Death Bond
description: Healing and life-stealing effects are shared between bonded allies.

name: Reap
description: You deliver a merciless finishing strike, siphoning life from enemies.

name: Summon Reanimation
description: You call forth a previously claimed undead champion, returning it to the battlefield.

name: Death Nova
description: You release a burst of decaying energy that erupts outward, rotting enemies caught in the blast.

name: Death Spiral
description: You spin into a violent scythe assault, tearing through everything nearby as necrotic force surges outward.

name: Necrotic Presence
description: An oppressive undead field empowers necrotic attacks and erodes resistance within its reach.

name: Grave Chill
description: A chilling necrotic presence hastens allies while sapping the speed of nearby enemies.

name: Soul Drain
description: A draining aura siphons life from nearby foes, sustaining those who fight within it.

name: High Guard
description: Enter a steadfast stance, raising your shield high to protect nearby allies from incoming harm.

name: Holy Shield
description: Bless your shield with divine protection, hardening your defenses against both steel and sorcery.

name: Sacrifice
description: Offer a portion of your own vitality to channel divine power, converting pain into radiant strength.

name: Consecration
description: Sanctify the ground in divine light, healing allies and burning foes who stand within its glow.

name: Aegis of Light
description: Invoke a radiant barrier of faith, blocking all incoming attacks for a short time, for you and nearby allies.

name: Shield Bash
description: Charge forward with your shield, sending out a shockwave that staggers and stuns nearby enemies.

name: Sanctify
description: Bless your armor with divine light, transforming your element to Holy.

name: Judgement Blade
description: Summon a radiant blade that cleaves through foes, dealing holy damage and leaving them slowed and exposed to further strikes.

name: Divine Punishment
description: Call down a rain of radiant swords from above, piercing the unworthy with sustained holy fury.

name: Shield Throw
description: Hurl your shield forward, striking multiple enemies as divine light arcs between them before returning to your hand.

name: Life Bond
description: Link your life to an ally's, taking their wounds upon yourself.

name: Grand Cross
description: Unleash a radiant cross of holy light that expands outward, purging the battlefield in waves of divine power.

name: Defiance Aura
description: Radiate unyielding faith that lessens the force of ranged and magical attacks for allies nearby.

name: Vitality Aura
description: Emit a gentle divine presence that strengthens the body, increasing vitality and restoring health over time.

name: Conviction Aura
description: Inspire allies with unwavering resolve, increasing their physical and magical strength.

name: Gryphon Riding
description: Through divine bond and discipline, the Paladin earns the right to ride a holy gryphon. Together, they soar as beacon and blade of the heavens.

name: High Heal
description: Channels an intense surge of divine power to fully restore an ally's vitality, at great mana cost.

name: Salvation
description: Calls forth celestial light to return all fallen allies to life, restoring a small portion of their strength and spirit.

name: Mace Mastery
description: Enhances attack power when using maces. Increases attack speed.

name: Sanctuary
description: Raises a sacred tree that blesses the ground around it. Allies within its light steadily recover health, while undead that enter the sanctuary are repelled and harmed by its radiance.

name: Status Recovery
description: Channels divine clarity to free an ally from paralysis or frozen bindings, restoring movement and control.

name: Turn Undead
description: Attempts to purge undead and shadow-aligned enemies through divine judgment. Chance to deal 777% damage to Undead and Shadow. Chance = 2% per Lv + INT/5 + LUK/5 + MonsterMissingHealth% * 20

name: Zeal
description: Inspires an ally with fervent conviction, boosting all damage for a duration.

name: Damnation
description: Calls down divine judgment upon the wicked, stripping away their defenses and leaving them vulnerable.

name: Sacred Ground
description: Hallow the earth itself, purging corruption and shielding those who stand within the sanctified circle.

name: Guardian Spirit
description: Conjures a sacred barrier, shielding allies within from ranged attacks.

name: Exorcism
description: Calls down sacred radiance upon an area, banishing cursed beings and striking foes with holy wrath.

name: Endow Holy
description: Blesses a weapon with holy light, converting its attacks to Holy element.

name: Smite
description: Strikes the target with a blessed blow, dealing holy physical damage and a chance to stun enemies with divine force.

name: Divinity
description: Enters a transcendent state of grace, amplifying the priest's healing and protective power for a short duration.

name: Sacrament
description: Focuses the priest's will into perfect spiritual clarity, empowering holy spells and cast proficiency.

name: Fanaticism
description: Fills the priest with unshakable zeal, each strike grows swifter and more relentless, guided by divine wrath.

name: Holy Wrath
description: Unleashes concentrated holy power upon an enemy, dealing heavy damage and inflicting silence and holy vulnerability.

name: Absolution
description: Removes all buffs and harmful statuses from the target, returning them to a neutral state.

name: Blade Mastery
description: Enhances attack power of daggers and swords. Increases attack speed.

name: Shadow Step
description: Teleports behind a target and strikes.

name: Multistrike
description: Grant multistrike to your basic attacks.

name: Venom Strike
description: Strikes a target with a chance to inflict poison

name: Cloaking
description: Wraps the body in shifting shadows, blending seamlessly with the surroundings. While cloaked, movement is hidden from sight until the veil is broken by attack or skill use.

name: Lightning Reflexes
description: Movement becomes instinct, action becomes lightning.

name: Venom Coating
description: A venomous sheen coats the blade, each strike delivering a silent death.

name: Blade Dance
description: Unleashes a flurry of strikes around you.

name: Dual Wield Mastery
description: Unlocks the ability to wield a weapon in each hand.

name: Smoke Screen
description: Creates a blinding mist.

name: Steady Hands
description: Improves control and precision, enhancing dexterity-based actions.

name: Strafing Volley
description: Fires a rapid sequence of arrows at a single target.

name: Precise Aim
description: Increases attack range and hit rate, enhancing precision with ranged weapons.

name: Arrow Shower
description: Fires a flurry of arrows high into the air, raining down over a wide area. Enemies caught within suffer repeated strikes, forcing them to scatter.

name: Force Shot
description: A powerful shot that knocks the target back on impact.

name: Mark Target
description: Focus your aim on a single enemy, exposing their weak points. The target becomes Marked, reducing its ability to evade and resist critical strikes.

name: Inner Focus
description: Heightens awareness and reaction speed, increasing AGI and DEX.

name: Slow Trap
description: Unleashes a seeping pool of violet energy that spreads across the ground. Enemies who enter its grasp find their movements dragged and dulled, as though wading through shadowed mire.

name: Volatile Bolt
description: An arrow that explodes on impact, dealing area damage around the target.

name: Sniper's Nest
description: Take a steady stance and ready your weapon. While Sniper's Nest is active, your attack speed, and power rise, but your movement is hindered.

name: Flame Orb
description: Launch a slow-moving core of condensed energy that threatens the battlefield before rupturing outward on impact, releasing a controlled burst that scorches everything within range.

name: Binding Spiral
description: A spinning technique that drags enemies inward as pressure collapses toward a single point. At the moment of convergence, energy is stripped to zero, freezing all caught at the core.

name: Flash Step
description: Instantly cross space and strike the target's position, committing fully to the engagement and collapsing the distance in a single motion.

name: Fire Release
description: Summons a blazing whale of flame that leaps skyward before crashing down, engulfing enemies in fire.

name: Ice Release
description: Calls forth a spectral pufferfish that spits shards of ice, piercing foes and leaving them slowed.

name: Lightning Release
description: Unleashes a phoenix of lightning that streaks straight ahead, striking through all in its path.

name: Flow State
description: Adopt a disciplined combat rhythm, weaving techniques between strikes. Autoattacks draw on magical power and trigger techniques more frequently, favoring sustained pressure over raw burst.

name: Ninjutsu Mastery
description: Refined control of hidden arts enhances magical output and mana flow, extending the reach and endurance of advanced techniques.

name: Shadow Seal
description: Forms a seal of shadows that splits your presence, summoning multiple clones to fight alongside you.

name: Shadow Mastery
description: Mastery of shadow sharpens instinct and movement, allowing the Shinobi to slip past attacks with speed and uncanny evasions.

name: Silent Edge
description: Enter a lethal stance focused on precision and timing. Critical strikes land harder and more often, rewarding decisive movement and clean execution.

name: Fan Of Knives
description: Scatter a fan of blades in a sweeping arc, leaping through the target's space to evade retaliation while opening enemies to follow-up techniques.

name: Elusive Feint
description: Granting a brief moment of perfect evasion against all attacks, leaving behind a shadowy double as you slide backward out of danger.

name: Twist Of Fate
description: Strike with overwhelming force, stunning and scattering enemies before slipping back into the shadows, readying the next decisive move.

name: Shuriken Fan
description: Hurls a massive enchanted shuriken that spins in place, striking nearby enemies in rapid succession before fading.

name: Mimic Seal
description: Copies the essence of a target's magic, allowing you to cast their spell as your own.

name: Black Blade
description: Launches a whirling blade of darkness that carves toward a target, cutting through with shadow force.

name: Summon Angel
description: A radiant healer who channels light into soothing magic and soul-searing strikes.

name: Summon Cactus
description: A spiny sentinel that soaks up hits and punishes attackers without flinching.

name: Summon Mastery
description: Improves the effectiveness of summoned allies, allowing them to inherit more of your power.

name: Summon Cat
description: A nimble caster that darts between foes, blasting lightning with wild flair.

name: Summon Wolf
description: A fast, feral brawler that tears into enemies with raw strength and speed.

name: Resonance Well
description: A tranquil hum radiates outward, harmonizing body and spirit. Beneath its gentle shimmer, vitality stirs and clarity takes root.

name: Suppression Field
description: A ghostly presence descends in silence. Within its reach, the air thickens and thought falters, all sound swallowed by stillness.

name: Soul Strike
description: You form a protective pact with your summon.

name: Banishment Field
description: Radiant spirits descend in silent judgment, severing the soul from grace. The afflicted find their healing turned against them, their essence exposed to the full weight of Magic assault.

name: Dissonance Well
description: A field of spiritual interference thrums with jagged tension, stalling thought, movement, and will. Those within find their bodies sluggish, their instincts dulled, as if time itself resists them.

name: Conjurer
description: A deeper bond with summoned entities and restorative magic.

name: Guardian Bond
description: You forge a protective link with your summon. Vitality and regeneration flow between you, reinforcing both bodies in quiet resilience.

name: Fury Bond
description: You bind your spirit to an ally, unleashing a shared surge of ferocity. Both of you strike harder and truer, your blows driven by rising fury.

name: Invoker
description: Your mastery of spellcasting and summoning sharpens the mind. Empowers your summons to echo Soul Strike, allowing their magic to resonate with your own.

name: Summon Command
description: Commands all active summons to converge on the chosen enemy or location, forcing them to attack your target.

name: Summon Recall
description: Calls all active summons back to your side, cancelling their current actions and returning them instantly.

name: Summon Swap
description: Instantly swaps your active summon configuration, allowing rapid adaptation in combat.

name: Summon Mount
description: Mount your active summon, taking direct control while remaining able to cast your own abilities and sharing all damage taken. Summon must be at it's final stage.

name: Axe Mastery
description: Enhances attack power of axes and swords. Improves critical damage.

name: Bash
description: Delivers a crushing blow with a chance to stun the target.

name: Axe Quicken
description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or axe.

name: Stomp
description: Slams the ground, stunning enemies in a wide area.

name: Twin Cleave
description: Swing your weapon twice in wide arcs, cutting down all enemies in front of you.

name: Vortex Slash
description: Unleashes a powerful spinning slash that damages enemies in a wide area and pulls them toward the caster.

name: Whirlwind
description: Spin in place, slashing all enemies around you over time.

name: Honed Blade
description: A life of combat has perfected your edge, each critical strike hits with ruthless efficiency.

name: Natural Resistance
description: Countless battles have hardened your body and spirit. Reduces damage from all elements.

name: Weaver Mastery
description: A quiet art that intertwines might, mind, and spirit.

name: Fire Pillar
description: Summons a pillar of flame that erupts from the ground, searing enemies caught within its blaze.

name: Avatar of Fire
description: Assume the Avatar of Fire, embodying living flame. Permanently attunes you to Fire, igniting enemies that strike you and increasing all healing received.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Unleashes a bolt of lightning that arcs between enemies, chaining to additional targets.

name: Meteor
description: Calls down a burning mass from the heavens that explodes on impact, reducing the battlefield to ash.

name: Tempest
description: A furious gale tears across the battlefield, scattering and striking all caught in its path.

name: Avatar of Stone
description: Assume the Avatar of Stone, anchoring yourself with unyielding earth. Permanently attunes you to Earth, increasing resistances and block.

name: Elemental Overload
description: Unleashes an overwhelming surge of elemental power, erupting from the ground in a catastrophic blast. Deals massive Magic damage in a vast area and leaves enemies exposed to arcane force. The effect of Elemental Overload is determined by your current elemental attunement.

name: Avatar of Storm
description: Assume the Avatar of Storm, wreathed in surging wind and lightning. Permanently attunes you to Wind, discharging lightning when struck and increasing movement speed.

name: Earthquake
description: Shakes the ground with devastating tremors, toppling and stunning all enemies caught in the upheaval.

name: Blizzard
description: Unleashes a flurry of jagged ice, freezing and battering enemies in its wake.

name: Earth Wall
description: Raises a wall of solid stone from the ground, obstructing foes and shaping the battlefield.

name: Avatar of Frost
description: Assume the Avatar of Frost, cloaking yourself in bitter cold. Permanently attunes you to Water, freezing attackers and greatly increasing mana regeneration.

name: Hydro Vortex
description: Unleashes a violent spiral of water, dragging enemies into its raging current.

name: Arcane Sigil
description: Pushes your casting beyond safe limits, greatly increasing magic damage and cast speed at the cost of doubled mana consumption.
